texts.label: text
texts.orig: This agreement outlines the terms and conditions under which the Tour Operator may market and sell accommodation and activities at O'Leleshwa Retreat to its clients at contracted STO rates.
texts.text: This agreement outlines the terms and conditions under which the Tour Operator may market and sell accommodation and activities at O'Leleshwa Retreat to its clients at contracted STO rates.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The present agreement is made for hotel accommodation rates and related services & facilities to be provided at the Hotel for the period of 1 ST  OCTOBER 2025 TO 31 ST  DECEMBER 2026 (herein referred to as the 'Validity of Contract').
texts.text: The present agreement is made for hotel accommodation rates and related services & facilities to be provided at the Hotel for the period of 1 ST  OCTOBER 2025 TO 31 ST  DECEMBER 2026 (herein referred to as the 'Validity of Contract').

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Notwithstanding the above, if the Property is closed permanently (subject to the situation) and/or the management of the Property, related or associated companies ceases, the present agreement shall be terminated automatically and as of right as from the effective date of the said permanent closure or cessation of the management, as the case may be. This is not applicable in the case of temporary closure. The Property will however have to give to the Key Account written notice of 90 days prior or as soon as possible, to the effective date of such permanent or temporary closure, or cessation of management.
texts.text: Notwithstanding the above, if the Property is closed permanently (subject to the situation) and/or the management of the Property, related or associated companies ceases, the present agreement shall be terminated automatically and as of right as from the effective date of the said permanent closure or cessation of the management, as the case may be. This is not applicable in the case of temporary closure. The Property will however have to give to the Key Account written notice of 90 days prior or as soon as possible, to the effective date of such permanent or temporary closure, or cessation of management.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 2. Free Independent Travelers Rates, Conditions & Special Offers
texts.text: 2. Free Independent Travelers Rates, Conditions & Special Offers

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: i. All rates are quoted per Suite/Villa per night in US DOLLARS (USD) .
texts.text: All rates are quoted per Suite/Villa per night in US DOLLARS (USD) .

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ii. Rates apply to bedrooms, extra beds, room supplements, and meals when applicable.
texts.text: Rates apply to bedrooms, extra beds, room supplements, and meals when applicable.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: iii. Rates are inclusive of all charges and government tax, are herein referred as 'Nett', and  are  subject  to  change  according  to  local  laws  and  regulations  in  which  the Property is located. In the event of changes to the charges and/or government tax, or if additional taxes are introduced, the rates will be adjusted accordingly subject to the  Property  giving  the  Key  Account  notice  as  and  when  notified  by  the  local legislature.
texts.text: Rates are inclusive of all charges and government tax, are herein referred as 'Nett', and  are  subject  to  change  according  to  local  laws  and  regulations  in  which  the Property is located. In the event of changes to the charges and/or government tax, or if additional taxes are introduced, the rates will be adjusted accordingly subject to the  Property  giving  the  Key  Account  notice  as  and  when  notified  by  the  local legislature.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: i. FULL BOARD : The major differentiator is that as an exclusive use villa concept - the guests  will  be  able  to  determine  their  own  daily  meal  schedule.  Different  meal venues and meal styles will  be utilized throughout the guest stay. Private  Chef menu with a curated 4-day menu is offered. All meals are included with lunch or dinner on arrival day and breakfast on departure day.
texts.text: FULL BOARD : The major differentiator is that as an exclusive use villa concept - the guests  will  be  able  to  determine  their  own  daily  meal  schedule.  Different  meal venues and meal styles will  be utilized throughout the guest stay. Private  Chef menu with a curated 4-day menu is offered. All meals are included with lunch or dinner on arrival day and breakfast on departure day.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ii. The property reserves the right to change the format of Breakfast, Lunch or Dinner.
texts.text: The property reserves the right to change the format of Breakfast, Lunch or Dinner.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: iii. The meal plan supplements remain applicable and payable in full by the Key Account. However, the Property reserves the right to charge Guests directly at the Hotel higher than  contracted  prices  for  all  and  any  meal  supplements  where  no  written agreement/ar rangement has been made prior to the Guests' arrival in the property.
texts.text: The meal plan supplements remain applicable and payable in full by the Key Account. However, the Property reserves the right to charge Guests directly at the Hotel higher than  contracted  prices  for  all  and  any  meal  supplements  where  no  written agreement/ar rangement has been made prior to the Guests' arrival in the property.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: i. For contract purposes, the Property defines Children/Teens as follows: Children of all ages are welcome.
texts.text: For contract purposes, the Property defines Children/Teens as follows: Children of all ages are welcome.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ii. Children  aged  0 -3years  of  age  stay  free  when  sharing  with  parents  (in  existing bedding).
texts.text: Children  aged  0 -3years  of  age  stay  free  when  sharing  with  parents  (in  existing bedding).

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: iii. Children aged 4 -15 years of age are charged 50% of the adult rate.
texts.text: Children aged 4 -15 years of age are charged 50% of the adult rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: iv. Babysitting services are available upon request (advance booking required).
texts.text: Babysitting services are available upon request (advance booking required).

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: v. Baby cots and extra beds are on request and subject to availability.
texts.text: Baby cots and extra beds are on request and subject to availability.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: vi. All  Guests with accompanying baby/infant/child/teen shall undertake to complete the Liability Disclaimer Form upon check in at the Hotel. All other prevailing terms and conditions at the hotel shall apply to the Guests during their stay.
texts.text: All  Guests with accompanying baby/infant/child/teen shall undertake to complete the Liability Disclaimer Form upon check in at the Hotel. All other prevailing terms and conditions at the hotel shall apply to the Guests during their stay.

texts.orig: O'Leleshwa Retreat is located in the secure and beautiful Green Park Estate. The vistas afforded by the property are magnificent and are a highlight of the property.
texts.text: O'Leleshwa Retreat is located in the secure and beautiful Green Park Estate. The vistas afforded by the property are magnificent and are a highlight of the property.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Within Green Park and surrounds there are no other intimate and high-end hospitality offerings - making this a unique destination.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The direct link to assisting the Kasarani community is a key focus of the property. Relaying this to the various guests as well as creating community-based projects that support the property is going to be a fundamental driving focus.
